General.Name: Kader Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Kader Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades plastic, electronic and stuffed toys, and model trains in Hong Kong, Mainland China, North America, Europe, Japan, Singapore, and internationally. It operates in three segments: Toys and Model Trains, Property Investment, and Investment Holding. The company offers model train locomotives; other hobby items, including electronic slot racing cars and digital controls, as well as accessories, such as scenery, promotional cars, and trucks; and scale locomotives, coach cars, rolling stockcars, and cabooses under the Bachmann brand. It also provides original equipment manufacture and original design manufacture services, as well as in-house plush pattern design and sampling services; engineering services comprising product design and development, mould design and development, electronic engineering, and production process engineering; anddesigns and manufactures plush and educational toys for babies under the Tinco brand. In addition, the company leases office premises, and commercial and industrial buildings; and invest in securities. Further, it is involved in acting as an agent for sale of toys; property development and investment activities; sub-letting of wine cellar; and provision of management services. Kader Holdings Company Limited was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Kader Building, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong
